controls.control_description:
Exchange facilities for
transactions included in Schedule II to the Rules may be permitted by the

controls.control_description:
All applications
for release of foreign exchange exceeding the limits as prescribed in Schedule III
to the Rules should be referred to the Regional Office concerned of the Foreign
Exchange Department of the Reserve Bank, under whose jurisdiction the
applicant is functioning / residing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to the regional office concerned of the foreign exchange department of the reserve bank, under whose jurisdiction the applicant is functio

controls.control_objective: To ensure under the foreign exchange management act, 1999
controls.control_description:
Prohibition:
Remittances in any form towards participation in lottery schemes are prohibited
under the Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to under the foreign exchange management act, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, exercise due caution and to be extra vigilant while opening or allowing transactions in such accounts
controls.control_description:
AD Category - I banks must, therefore, exercise due
caution and to be extra vigilant while opening or allowing transactions in such
accounts.

studies abroad)  available to resident individuals
under Para 1 of Schedule III to Foreign Exchange Management (Current Account
Transactions) Amendment Rules, 2015 dated May 26, 2015 are subsumed under the

controls.control_objective: To ensure refuse to purchase the foreign exchange merely on the ground that the prescribed period has expired
controls.control_description:
Travel:
Note: Where a person approaches an Authorised Person for surrender of unspent/
unutilized foreign exchange after the prescribed period of 180 days, Authorised
Person should not refuse to purchase the foreign exchange merely on the ground
that the prescribed period has expired.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refuse to purchase the foreign exchange merely on the ground that the prescribed period has expired

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean as defined in explanation to para 1(iv)(a)(a) of schedule i of fema notification 3/2000-rb, dated the may 3, 2000, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
Explanation:—For the purposes of this sub-paragraph, the expression “infrastructure’
shall mean as defined in explanation to para 1(iv)(A)(a) of Schedule I of FEMA
Notification 3/2000-RB, dated the May 3, 2000, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean as defined in explanation to para 1(iv)(a)(a) of schedule i of fema notification 3/2000-rb, dated the may 3, 2000, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of the reserve bank of india for remittances exceeding five per cent of investment brought into india or usd 100,000 whichever
controls.control_description:
Remittances towards re-imbursement of pre-incorporation expenses
6 Omitted as a corrigendum
10
Remittances by persons other than individuals shall require prior approval of the
Reserve Bank of India for remittances exceeding five per cent of investment brought
into India or USD 100,000 whichever is higher, by an entity in India by way of
reimbursement of pre-incorporation expenses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of the reserve bank of india for remittances exceeding five per cent of investment brought into india or usd 100,000 whichever

controls.control_objective: To ensure sell foreign exchange towards payment of fees to schools/educational institutions under the administrative control of foreign embassies
controls.control_description:
Payment of fees in foreign currency - Embassy affiliated educational 
institutions 
Authorised Dealers may sell foreign exchange towards payment of fees to
schools/educational institutions under the administrative control of foreign
embassies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to sell foreign exchange towards payment of fees to schools/educational institutions under the administrative control of foreign embassies

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow cable operators or collection agents in india of overseas tv media companies, to remit subscription collected from subscribers in india/advertis
controls.control_description:
Remittance towards payments of collected subscription to overseas TV 
media company 
Authorised dealers may allow cable operators or collection agents in India of
overseas TV media companies, to remit subscription collected from subscribers in
India/advertisement charges collected from the advertisers who are eligible to
advertise on overseas TV channels without any prior permission from the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow cable operators or collection agents in india of overseas tv media companies, to remit subscription collected from subscribers in india/advertis

controls.control_objective: To ensure sell foreign exchange to the concerned resident indian company which has been awarded the contract
controls.control_description:
In such
cases, authorised dealers may sell foreign exchange to the concerned resident
Indian company which has been awarded the contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to sell foreign exchange to the concerned resident indian company which has been awarded the contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow agents in india of the overseas organisations issuing pre-paid telephone cards to remit the sale proceeds of such cards, net of their commission
controls.control_description:
Sale of overseas telephone cards
Authorised Dealers may allow agents in India of the overseas organisations issuing
pre-paid telephone cards to remit the sale proceeds of such cards, net of their
commission, to the issuers of the telephone cards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow agents in india of the overseas organisations issuing pre-paid telephone cards to remit the sale proceeds of such cards, net of their commission

controls.control_objective: To ensure permit drawal of foreign exchange by persons for payment of royalty and lump-sum payment under technical collaboration agreements without the approval
controls.control_description:
Liberalization of foreign technical collaboration agreements
AD Category-I banks may permit drawal of foreign exchange by persons for payment
of royalty and lump-sum payment under technical collaboration agreements without
the approval of Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Government of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to permit drawal of foreign exchange by persons for payment of royalty and lump-sum payment under technical collaboration agreements without the approval

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sold up to the limit indicated below: i
controls.control_description:
Out of the overall foreign exchange (USD 250,000 per financial year) being
sold to a traveller, exchange in the form of foreign currency notes and coins
may be sold up to the limit indicated below:
i.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be released
controls.control_description:
Travellers proceeding to Islamic Republic of Iran, Russian Federation
and other Republics of Commonwealth of Independent States - full
exchange may be released.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be released

controls.control_objective: To ensure be released
controls.control_description:
Travellers proceeding for Haj/Umrah pilgrimage- full amount of
entitlement in cash or up to the cash limit as specified by the Haj
Committee of India, may be released.

controls.control_description:
Authorised Dealers may remit foreign exchange up to a reasonable limit, at
the request of a traveller towards his hotel accommodation, tour
arrangements, etc., in the countries proposed to be visited by him.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to remit foreign exchange up to a reasonable limit, at the request of a traveller towards his hotel accommodation, tour arrangements, etc

controls.control_description:
Meeting of medical expenses of NRI close relatives by resident individuals

payment being in the nature of a resident to resident transaction may be covered

controls.control_description:

controls.control_objective: To ensure items, like lottery tickets, banned or proscribed magazines, participation in sweepstakes, payment for call-back services, etc
controls.control_description:
ICCs cannot be used on internet or otherwise for purchase of prohibited
items, like lottery tickets, banned or proscribed magazines, participation in
sweepstakes, payment for call-back services, etc., since no drawal of foreign
exchange is permitted for such items/activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to items, like lottery tickets, banned or proscribed magazines, participation in sweepstakes, payment for call-back services, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be made directly to the card issuing agency abroad, and not to a third party
controls.control_description:
The remittance for
this purpose should also be made directly to the card issuing agency abroad,
and not to a third party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be made directly to the card issuing agency abroad, and not to a third party

controls.control_objective: To ensure 3, 2000, as amended from time to time, dealing with receipt from and payment to a person resident outside india
controls.control_description:
FEMA.16/2000-RB dated May 3, 2000, as amended from time to 
time, dealing with Receipt from and Payment to a person Resident outside India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 3, 2000, as amended from time to time, dealing with receipt from and payment to a person resident outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue iccs to nris/pios, without prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
ADs may issue ICCs to NRIs/PIOs, without prior approval of the Reserve
Bank, subject to the condition that charges on the use of ICCs should be
settled by the concerned NRIs/PIOs only out of inward remittances or
balances held in their Non-Resident External (NRE) Accounts/ Foreign
Currency Non-Resident (FCNR) Accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue iccs to nris/pios, without prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue international debit cards (idcs) which can be used by a resident for drawing cash or making payment to a merchant establishment overseas during
controls.control_description:
Banks authorised to deal in foreign exchange may issue International Debit
Cards (IDCs) which can be used by a resident for drawing cash or making
payment to a merchant establishment overseas during his visit abroad.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue international debit cards (idcs) which can be used by a resident for drawing cash or making payment to a merchant establishment overseas during

controls.control_objective: To ensure items like lottery tickets, banned or proscribed magazines, participation in sweepstakes, payment for call-back services, etc
controls.control_description:
The IDCs cannot be used on internet for purchase of prohibited items like
lottery tickets, banned or proscribed magazines, participation in sweepstakes,
payment for call-back services, etc., i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to items like lottery tickets, banned or proscribed magazines, participation in sweepstakes, payment for call-back services, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, advise the foreign airlines to discontinue the practice of using overseas banks for settlement of inr transactions on account of sale of
controls.control_description:
AD
Category- I banks may, therefore, advise the foreign airlines to discontinue the
practice of using overseas banks for settlement of INR transactions on account of
sale of air tickets in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , therefore, advise the foreign airlines to discontinue the practice of using overseas banks for settlement of inr transactions on account of sale of

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue store value card/ charge card/ smart card to residents traveling on private/business visit abroad which are used for making payments at overseas
controls.control_description:
8
Authorised Dealer banks may issue Store Value Card/ Charge Card/ Smart Card
to residents traveling on private/business visit abroad which are used for making
payments at overseas merchant establishments and also for drawing cash from
ATM terminals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue store value card/ charge card/ smart card to residents traveling on private/business visit abroad which are used for making payments at overseas

controls.control_objective: To ensure redeem the unutilized balance outstanding in the cards immediately upon request by the resident indians to whom the cards are issued subject to retent
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, all such
Authorised Persons shall redeem the unutilized balance outstanding in the cards
immediately upon request by the resident Indians to whom the cards are issued
subject to retention of:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to redeem the unutilized balance outstanding in the cards immediately upon request by the resident indians to whom the cards are issued subject to retent

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
Any
additional remittance in excess of the same shall require prior approval of the
Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of the reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the chief general manager, reserve bank of india, central office, foreign exchange department, foreign investments division (epd), cen
controls.control_description:
Applications for remittances for purposes other than those
specified above may be forwarded to the Chief General Manager, Reserve Bank of
India, Central Office, Foreign Exchange Department, Foreign Investments Division
(EPD), Central Office Building, Mumbai-400 001, together with (a) details of their
foreign exchange earnings during the last 3 years, (b) brief background of the
company’s activities, (c) purpose of the donation and (d) likely benefits to the
corporate.6
4.2.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded to the chief general manager, reserve bank of india, central office, foreign exchange department, foreign investments division (epd), cen

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of the reserve bank of india if commission per transaction to agents abroad for sale of residential flats or commercial plots i
controls.control_description:
Commission to agents abroad for sale of residential flats or commercial
plots in India
Remittances by persons other than individuals shall require prior approval of the
Reserve Bank of India if commission per transaction to agents abroad for sale of
residential flats or commercial plots in India exceeds USD 25,000 or five percent of
the inward remittance whichever is more.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of the reserve bank of india if commission per transaction to agents abroad for sale of residential flats or commercial plots i

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of the reserve bank of india if remittances exceed usd 10,000,000 per project for any consultancy services in respect of infras
controls.control_description:
Remittances towards consultancy services
Remittances by persons other than individuals shall require prior approval of the
Reserve Bank of India if remittances exceed USD 10,000,000 per project for any
consultancy services in respect of infrastructure projects and USD 1,000,000 per
project, for other consultancy services procured from outside India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of the reserve bank of india if remittances exceed usd 10,000,000 per project for any consultancy services in respect of infras

controls.control_objective: To ensure permit drawal of foreign exchange by person for purchase of trademark or franchise in india without approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Drawal of foreign exchange for remittance for purchase of trademark or
franchise in India
AD Category-I banks may permit drawal of foreign exchange by person for purchase
of trademark or franchise in India without approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to permit drawal of foreign exchange by person for purchase of trademark or franchise in india without approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure effect remittances at the request of agents in india who have tie-up arrangements with hotels/ agents, etc., abroad for providing hotel accommodation or making other tour arrangements for travel from india
controls.control_description:
Authorised Dealers may effect remittances at the request of agents in
India who have tie-up arrangements with hotels/ agents, etc., abroad for
providing hotel accommodation or making other tour arrangements for travel
from India, provided the Authorised Dealer is satisfied that the remittance is
being made out of the foreign exchange purchased by the traveller concerned
from an Authorised Person (including exchange drawn for private travel
abroad) in accordance with the Rules, Regulations and Direction in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to effect remittances at the request of agents in india who have tie-up arrangements with hotels/ agents, etc., abroad for providing hotel accommodation or making other tour arrangements for travel from india

controls.control_objective: To ensure open foreign currency accounts in the name of agents in india who have tie up arrangements with hotels/ agents, etc
controls.control_description:
Authorised Dealer may open foreign currency accounts in the name of
agents in India who have tie up arrangements with hotels/ agents, etc.,
abroad 
for 
providing 
hotel  accommodation 
or 
making 
other 
tour
arrangements for travellers from India provided:-
i) 
the credits to the account are by way of depositing
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open foreign currency accounts in the name of agents in india who have tie up arrangements with hotels/ agents, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow tour operators to remit the cost of rail/ road/ water/transportation charges outside india without any prior approval from the reserve bank, net
controls.control_description:
Authorised Dealer may allow tour operators to remit the cost of rail/
road/ water/transportation charges outside India without any prior approval
from the Reserve Bank, net of commission/ mark up due to the agent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow tour operators to remit the cost of rail/ road/ water/transportation charges outside india without any prior approval from the reserve bank, net

controls.control_objective: To ensure require to be remitted from india to these neighbouring countries for services rendered by travel agents and hoteliers in these countries
controls.control_description:
In respect of consolidated tours arranged by travel agents in India for
foreign tourists visiting India and neighbouring countries like Nepal,
Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, etc., against advance payments/ reimbursement
12
through an Authorised Dealer, part of the foreign exchange received in India
against such consolidated tour arrangement, may require to be remitted from
India to these neighbouring countries for services rendered by travel agents
and hoteliers in these countries.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require to be remitted from india to these neighbouring countries for services rendered by travel agents and hoteliers in these countries

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow such remittances after verifying that the amount being remitted to the neighbouring countries (inclusive of remittances
controls.control_description:
Authorised Dealer may allow such
remittances after verifying that the amount being remitted to the neighbouring
countries (inclusive of remittances, if any, already made against the tour) does
not exceed the amount actually remitted to India and the country of residence
of the beneficiary is not Pakistan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow such remittances after verifying that the amount being remitted to the neighbouring countries (inclusive of remittances

controls.control_objective: To ensure be verified by the authorised persons while permitting remittances for various transactions, particularly of current account
controls.control_description:
Reserve Bank will not prescribe the documents which should be verified by
the Authorised Persons while permitting remittances for various transactions,
particularly of current account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be verified by the authorised persons while permitting remittances for various transactions, particularly of current account

controls.control_objective: To ensure to obtain a declaration and such other information from the person (applicant) on whose behalf the transaction is being undertaken that will reasonabl
controls.control_description:
In terms of the provisions contained in sub-section 5 of section 10 of the Act,
before undertaking any transaction in foreign exchange on behalf of any
person, an Authorised Dealer is required to obtain a declaration and such
other information from the person (applicant) on whose behalf the transaction
is being undertaken that will reasonably satisfy him that the transaction is not
designed to contravene or evade the provisions of the Act or any of the Rules
or Regulations made or Notifications or directions or orders issued under the
Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to obtain a declaration and such other information from the person (applicant) on whose behalf the transaction is being undertaken that will reasonabl

controls.control_objective: To ensure preserve the information / documents 7 omitted vide a
controls.control_description:
Authorised Dealers should preserve the information / documents
7 Omitted vide A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preserve the information / documents 7 omitted vide a

controls.control_objective: To ensure refuse in writing to undertake the transactions and shall
controls.control_description:
In case the person on whose behalf the transaction is being undertaken
refuses or does not give satisfactory compliance of the requirements of an
authorised person, he shall refuse in writing to undertake the transactions and
shall, if he has reasons to believe that any contravention / evasion is
contemplated by the person, report the matter to the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refuse in writing to undertake the transactions and shall

controls.control_objective: To ensure be retained for a period of one year by the authorised persons, together with the related documents, for the purpose of verification by their internal
controls.control_description:
The Form A2
should be retained for a period of one year by the Authorised Persons,
together with the related documents, for the purpose of verification by their
Internal Auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be retained for a period of one year by the authorised persons, together with the related documents, for the purpose of verification by their internal

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain form a2 in physical or digital form for all cross-border remittances, irrespective of the value of transaction, and other related documents
controls.control_description:
8Authorised Dealers shall obtain Form A2 in physical or digital form for all
cross-border remittances, irrespective of the value of transaction, and other
related documents, if and as may be necessary, subject to provisions of
Section 10(5) of FEMA 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain form a2 in physical or digital form for all cross-border remittances, irrespective of the value of transaction, and other related documents

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame appropriate internal guidelines, with the approval of their board, for the purpose
controls.control_description:
They shall frame appropriate internal guidelines,
with the approval of their Board, for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame appropriate internal guidelines, with the approval of their board, for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to comply with the relevant provisions of fema 1999 and know your customer (kyc) guidelines9, issued by rbi for all transactions
controls.control_description:
The Authorised Dealers shall
continue to comply with the relevant provisions of FEMA 1999 and Know Your
Customer (KYC) guidelines9, issued by RBI for all transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to comply with the relevant provisions of fema 1999 and know your customer (kyc) guidelines9, issued by rbi for all transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mandatory on the part of authorised dealers to comply with the requirement of the tax laws, as applicable
controls.control_description:
It shall be mandatory on the part of Authorised
Dealers to comply with the requirement of the tax laws, as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mandatory on the part of authorised dealers to comply with the requirement of the tax laws, as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure drawal of foreign exchange from an authorised person and includes opening of letter of credit or use of international credit card or international deb
controls.control_description:
(b) “Drawal” means drawal of foreign exchange from an authorised person and
includes opening of Letter of Credit or use of International Credit Card or
International Debit Card or ATM Card or any other thing by whatever name called
which has the effect of creating foreign exchange liability;

controls.control_description: (c) “Schedule” means a schedule appended to these rules;

Prohibition on drawal of Foreign Exchange---Drawal of foreign exchange by

a.

controls.control_objective: To ensure draw foreign exchange for a transaction included in the schedule ii without prior approval of the government of india
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to draw foreign exchange for a transaction included in the schedule ii without prior approval of the government of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply where the payment is made out of funds held in resident foreign currency (rfc) account of the remitter
controls.control_description:
Provided that this Rule shall not apply where the payment is made out of funds held
in Resident Foreign Currency (RFC) Account of the remitter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply where the payment is made out of funds held in resident foreign currency (rfc) account of the remitter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed as provided therein
controls.control_description:
Prior approval of Reserve Bank 
 
Every drawal of foreign exchange for transactions included in Schedule III shall be
governed as provided therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed as provided therein

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to drawal made out of funds held in exchange earners’ foreign currency (eefc) account of the remitter
controls.control_description:

held in Exchange Earners’ Foreign Currency (EEFC) account of the remitter.

controls.control_objective: To ensure also avail of foreign exchange facility, mutatis mutandis, within the limit prescribed under the said liberalised remittance scheme for the purposes m
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For the purpose of this item, a person resident in India on
account of his employment or deputation of a specified duration (irrespective
of length thereof) or for a specific job or assignments, the duration of which
does not exceed three years, is a resident but not permanently resident:
provided also that a person other than an individual may also avail of foreign
exchange facility, mutatis mutandis, within the limit prescribed under the said
Liberalised Remittance Scheme for the purposes mentioned herein above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to also avail of foreign exchange facility, mutatis mutandis, within the limit prescribed under the said liberalised remittance scheme for the purposes m

controls.control_objective: To ensure for the purposes mentioned at item numbers (iv), (vii) and (viii), the individual may avail of exchange facility for an amount in excess of the limit
controls.control_description:
(ix) Any other current account transaction
Provided that for the purposes mentioned at item numbers (iv), (vii) and (viii), the
individual may avail of exchange facility for an amount in excess of the limit
prescribed under the Liberalised Remittance Scheme as provided in regulation 4 to
FEMA Notification 1/2000-RB, dated the 3rd May, 2000 (here in after referred to as
the said Liberalised Remittance Scheme) if it is so required by a country of
emigration, medical institute offering treatment or the university, respectively:
Provided further that if an individual remits any amount under the said Liberalised
Remittance Scheme in a financial year, then the applicable limit for such individual
would be reduced from USD 250,000 (US Dollars Two Hundred and Fifty Thousand
Only) by the amount so remitted:
20
provided also that for a person who is resident but not permanently resident in India
and –
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to for the purposes mentioned at item numbers (iv), (vii) and (viii), the individual may avail of exchange facility for an amount in excess of the limit

controls.control_description:

company or subsidiary or joint venture in India of such foreign company,
may make remittance up to his net salary (after deduction of taxes, contribution to
provident fund and other deductions).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make remittance up to his net salary (after deduction of taxes, contribution to provident fund and other deductions)
